title: Meeting Agenda and Facilitator Guide
promptText: You are a professional meeting facilitator. Create a detailed agenda and facilitation guide for a [MEETING_DURATION] [MEETING_TYPE] meeting with [PARTICIPANT_COUNT] participants. The meeting objective is [MEETING_OBJECTIVE]. Attendees include [ATTENDEE_ROLES]. For each agenda item, provide: the topic, time allocation, the facilitator's talking points, discussion questions to pose, expected outcomes or decisions, and who should lead that section. Also include: a pre-meeting preparation checklist for attendees, ice-breaker or warm-up activity appropriate to the group, parking lot strategy for off-topic items, and a post-meeting follow-up template with action items format. Ensure the agenda leaves 10% buffer time for overruns.
description: Unproductive meetings cost organizations an estimated $37 billion annually, and the root cause is almost always poor planning and facilitation. This prompt generates a complete meeting playbook that goes beyond a simple agenda to include facilitation techniques, discussion prompts, and time management strategies. The pre-meeting checklist ensures attendees arrive prepared, while the parking lot strategy prevents derailment without dismissing important tangential topics. The post-meeting template creates accountability through clear action items. Use it for team standups, strategic planning sessions, client workshops, or board meetings.

variables.name: MEETING_OBJECTIVE
variables.example: align on Q3 priorities, resolve the feature vs. tech-debt allocation debate, and assign ownership for top 5 initiatives

variables.name: ATTENDEE_ROLES
variables.description: Who will be in the meeting
variables.example: VP of Product, 3 Product Managers, Engineering Director, 4 Tech Leads, UX Lead, and Head of Customer Success

tips: Share the agenda at least 24 hours before the meeting for maximum preparation
Assign a dedicated note-taker so the facilitator can focus on guiding discussion
Use the parking lot items to create future meeting agendas or async discussions
exampleOutput:
## Q3 Product Roadmap Review
**Duration:** 60 minutes | **Participants:** 12 | **Facilitator:** VP of Product

### Pre-Meeting Checklist
- [ ] PMs: Submit Q3 initiative proposals (template linked) by Monday EOD
- [ ] Eng Director: Prepare capacity estimates for Q3 by team
- [ ] Customer Success: Share top 10 customer-requested features with urgency ratings

### Agenda Item 1: Context Setting (5 min)
**Lead:** VP of Product
**Talking Points:** Recap Q2 outcomes vs. plan (hit 7/10 OKRs), share Q3 company-level goals from leadership
**Expected Outcome:** Shared understanding of strategic context
metaTitle: Meeting Agenda and Facilitator Guide for Gemini
metaDescription: Create productive meeting agendas with facilitation guides and follow-up templates. Try this free Gemini prompt to run better meetings.
